svg.title: Greenfield Connect network architecture diagram
svg.desc: Branch network topology showing dual-path WAN, the security and core switching layer, the server room build, and the three downstream segments: Wi-Fi, VoIP telephony, and wired endpoints, with guest network isolation.
svg.text: Guest Wi-Fi uses true Layer 2/3 isolation from corporate traffic — not just a separate SSID
85-person branch · Coimbatore · Zero customer-facing go-live slippage · 99.7% uptime (first 30 days)
